--- insert_assert_rows_modified.sql
INSERT INTO foo (x, y) VALUES (1, 2) ASSERT_ROWS_MODIFIED 1
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 17,
      NameEnd: 18,
      Name:    "x",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 20,
      NameEnd: 21,
      Name:    "y",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.ValuesInput{
    Values: 23,
    Rows:   []*ast.ValuesRow{
      &ast.ValuesRow{
        Lparen: 30,
        Rparen: 35,
        Exprs:  []*ast.DefaultExpr{
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 31,
              ValueEnd: 32,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "1",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 34,
              ValueEnd: 35,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "2",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  AssertRowsModified: &ast.AssertRowsModified{
    Assert:  37,
    NumRows: &ast.IntLiteral{
      ValuePos: 58,
      ValueEnd: 59,
      Base:     10,
      Value:    "1",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo (x, y) VALUES (1, 2) ASSERT_ROWS_MODIFIED 1
